title: "worde很大"

---
# worde很大

# 一：题目类型

[[P12.dp泄露]][[P21 dp泄露变种之e较大]]

# 二：题目

```python
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from enc import flag

m = bytes_to_long(flag)
p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)
n = p*q
e = getPrime(200)
d = gmpy2.invert(e,(p-1)*(q-1))
dp = d % (p-1)
c = pow(m,e,n)

print(f"n = {n}")
print(f"c = {c}")
print(f"e = {e}")
print(f"dp = {dp}")
'''
n = 
c = 
e = 821421279697470600641835956392799783385382291735782808054723

dp = 6398480006769439970525968417327825044882639745350010964301541747913215183331504639665312205132575764318770982169663732234147495835097235047273661985474257

'''
```

# 三：解题思路

dp泄露但是e比较大，无法通过遍历e去找k了,这里讲一下另外一种解法的推导过程
![[Pasted image 20241017183425.png]]

# 四：解题代码

```python
import libnum
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import *

n = 
c = 
e = 821421279697470600641835956392799783385382291735782808054723
dp = 6398480006769439970525968417327825044882639745350010964301541747913215183331504639665312205132575764318770982169663732234147495835097235047273661985474257

def solve_dp_leak(e,dp,n,c):
    p = gmpy2.gcd(pow(5,e*dp,n)-5,n)
    q = n//p
    phi = (p-1)*(q-1)
    try:
        d = gmpy2.invert(e,phi)
        m = pow(c,d,n)
        flag = long_to_bytes(m)
        return flag
    except:
        pass
flag = solve_dp_leak(e,dp,n,c)
print(flag)
```

# 五：感悟
